title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Kerala Tourism - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Kerala Tourism - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Kerala Tourism is actively seeking a talented and motivated Reservation Manager to join our dynamic team in Chandigarh. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Kerala Tourism:
Kerala Tourism is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kerala Tourism!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
